title: stelis hercules
intro: Stelis hercules, also known as the Hercules' club or Stinging Calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of saponins and other compounds. The health benefits of Stelis hercules include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate pain and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis hercules can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
